description_long: This is a pair of white, high-heeled platform boots with a chunky heel and a slightly squared toe. The boots are made from a soft, flexible material, likely leather or synthetic leather, and feature visible creasing and some minor scuff marks, indicating use. The upper part of the boots rises above the ankle and appears to have a zipper closure on the inner side, with some lacing detail at the back. The soles are thick and solid, providing significant elevation, and the heels are blocky and stable. The interior lining is a lighter beige or tan color, visible at the top edge. The overall design is bold and retro, suitable for fashion-forward urban environments.
description: A pair of white, high-heeled platform boots with a chunky heel, zipper closure, and visible creasing from use. The boots have a bold, retro style and are made from soft material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared toes, high platform soles, and the upper shaft with visible creasing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick platform, block heel, and zipper closure on the inner side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seam, lacing detail, and the full height of the chunky heels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the platform, heel, and the smooth, creased upper material.
